name: workshop-starter
description: Starter scaffold: Copilot SDK + Hydra plumbing, ready for you to build on.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n web,server -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev -w @workshop/web" "npm run dev -w @workshop/server"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @workshop/shared && npm run build -w @workshop/server && npm run build -w @workshop/web
